zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Joanna Gallop於1533年出生在英國多瑟特阿林頓時，她的父親Thomas Gallop30歲，母親Agneta Watkins14歲。她於1547年與Henry Alexander Way在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿林頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1600年在英國多瑟特布利波特享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特布利波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Joanna Gallop于1533年出生在英国多瑟特阿林頓时，她的父亲Thomas Gallop30岁，母亲Agneta Watkins14岁。她于1547年与Henry Alexander Way在英国英格兰多瑟特阿林頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1600年在英国多瑟特布利波特享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特布利波特。

nameMeanings.name: Gallop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gallup
meanings: English (Sussex): nickname possibly from Middle English galop (Old French galop) ‘gallop’ (the fastest pace of a horse) and given to one who habitually rode at speed, either through temperament or by occupation as a messenger. The surname itself has not been found before the 16th century, so it may be a shortened form of Galpin (earlier Galopin), which has a very similar post-medieval distribution and original sense. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Joanna Gallop was born in 1533, in Allington, Dorset, England, her father, Thomas Gallop, was 30 and her mother, Agneta Watkins, was 14. She married Henry Alexander Way in 1547, in Allington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1600, in Bridport, Dorset, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Bridport, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Joanna Gallop est née en 1533, à Allington, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Gallop, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agneta Watkins, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Alexander Way en 1547, à Allington, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1600, à Bridport, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Bridport, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Joanna Gallop 1533 in Allington, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Gallop 30 und ihre Mutter Agneta Watkins 14. Sie hat 1547 in Allington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Henry Alexander Way geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1600 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Bridport, Dorset, England und wurde in Bridport, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Joanna Gallop è nata il nel 1533 nel Allington, Dorset, England, sua padre, Thomas Gallop, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Agneta Watkins, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Henry Alexander Way nel 1547, nel Allington, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1600, nel Bridport, Dorset, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Bridport, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Joanna Gallopが1533年にイギリスドールセトアリントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Gallopは30歳，母Agneta Watkinsは14歳であった。1547年にイギリスイギリスドールセトアリントンでHenry Alexander Wayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1600年にイギリスドールセトブリドプオルトで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトブリドプオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Joanna Gallop(이)가 1533년 영국 도르세트 앨링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Gallop(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agneta Watkins(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1547년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 앨링턴에서 Henry Alexander Way(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1600년 영국 도르세트 브리드포트에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브리드포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Joanna Gallop nasceu em 1533, em Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Gallop, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agneta Watkins, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Alexander Way em 1547, em Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1600, em Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Joanna Gallop родилась в 1533 г. в местности аллингтон, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Gallop было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agneta Watkins, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Alexander Way в 1547 г. в местности аллингтон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1600 г. в местности бридпорт, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности бридпорт, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Joanna Gallop nació en 1533, en Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Gallop, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agneta Watkins, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Henry Alexander Way en 1547, en Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1600, en Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
